notes: ARTE Mediathek German streaming homepage. Dark theme. Header with search icon and user account icon. Secondary navigation bar (TV-Programm, Live, Bald online, ARTE Concert). Content rows with video thumbnails. Footer with newsletter signup form and links. The two newsletter forms (banner + footer) are merged into one since they serve the same purpose. Model detects search functionality via the search icon button.

endpoints.label: Account / Profile
endpoints.description: User profile/account icon in header for login/registration

endpoints.label: Search
endpoints.description: Search icon/button in header that opens search overlay

endpoints.label: Main Navigation
endpoints.description: Secondary nav bar: TV-Programm, Live, Bald online, ARTE Concert, plus category navigation

endpoints.label: Footer Navigation
endpoints.description: Footer with legal links, social media, language selection, partner links

endpoints.label: Newsletter Signup
endpoints.description: Email newsletter subscription form with email input and checkboxes
